examples: We also find that HGM can reduce the fibrocyte in the hepatic injury tissues, protect the liver against the forming of hepatocirrhosis.
Recently, a newly identified cell type, the fibrocyte, has been reported to contribute to wound healing and fibrotic conditions such as hypertrophic scarring.
Using this system, the investigators examined whether direct administration of stem cells into the inner ear could restore the cochlear fibrocyte population and aid hearing recovery.
